Levels.neutral: A gray rectangle, representing a neutral outcome, is displayed
Levels.reward: A dollar bill, representing a reward outcome, is displayed

Levels.nonviolation: The scene displayed belongs to a nonviolation condition pairmate
Levels.violation: The scene displayed belongs to a violation condition pairmate

pairmate.Description: A or B item within a pairmate

Levels.A: First item in a pairmate; only A scenes shown during familiarization task runs

pairID.Description: Pairmate number assigned to the A-B pairing for this participant
